name: opium-den
summary: An opium den. Low couches and mats arranged around a central brazier, lanterns in red paper, a keeper at a small counter dispensing pipes. Thick smoke, half-dreaming patrons.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: squareish, perimeter of couches around center

primary_palette.note: classic den — brazier central, couches radiating
keeper-forward — owner controls from the counter

story_prompts: evening haze — couches full, keeper moving among patrons, pipes refilled
overdose — a patron not breathing, keeper panicking, regulars ignoring
raid — guards bursting in, smoke concealing, patrons fleeing barefoot
private deal — two figures in a curtained alcove, pipe between them a pretense

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: dim red-lit (0.2-0.3) — smoke and shadow, red paper lanterns

anti_patterns: couches should be low — ground-level mats, not tall furniture
don't make it bright — gloom is the atmosphere
brazier or counter as the single point of light — never evenly lit
